_comment: Generic worked example. Copy this to config/network_profile.json (gitignored) and edit for your own deployment. The values below are placeholders; replace them with your actual gear.

gateway.protect_app_version: <your version, if Protect is in use>
gateway.site_uuid_hint: resolved at runtime via GET /sites; don't hardcode

isp.external_ipv4: <your public IPv4 — but consider whether you want this in any file outside .env>

switches: <list your switches by model code, e.g. USW-Pro-Max-24-PoE>
expected_offline_devices: <device name(s) you intentionally keep powered off; better to manage these via config/dismissals.yaml>
household_priorities: security: IoT/camera isolation from trusted devices
reliability: uptime, stable connections, DNS resolution
